title: Mob Tweaks
description: In this data pack you'll find tons of tweaks, buffs/nerfs and improved consistency in worldbuilding when it comes to mobs. Axolotls have become much better, Illusioners are now in the game and there are even a couple of useful new items.
body:
Contributors: logos by [Squizzle Dizzle](https://www.curseforge.com/members/squizzle_dizzle/projects) & [UnRoman](https://twitter.com/un_roman_) | Textures by [Nary](https://twitter.com/Narynotnarold)/_Minecraft: Dungeons_ | Polish translation by [Yupikay](https://www.youtube.com/user/firelord315) | Hebrew translation by [itayfeder](https://twitter.com/itayfeder) | Irish translation by [DylanTheSpud](https://github.com/DylanLewisGitHub) | Renders by [VelVoxelRaptor﻿](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCEH6ORtkeUxwMBQiOrTstdA)

  Some features of this pack originated in [_More Mobs_](https://inkor-s-universe.weebly.com/more-mobs.html), but now they and many other new additions are part of an independent project. In this data pack you'll find tons of tweaks, buffs/nerfs and improved consistency in worldbuilding when it comes to mobs. Axolotls have become much better, Illusioners are now in the game and there are even a couple of useful new items. To see more details check out the gallery and video below.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/E830173Q2Yw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Check out the 1st huge content update for this project - the _Shrinkflation & Variation_ update!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5QPP-GG6bjs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
